training_status: returning to gym after injury/illness, was previously active
health_conditions: history of significant injury and illness resulting in muscle loss

benefits.description: Dramatically reduced DOMS from debilitating (4-5 days, unable to function) to minimal/absent after gym sessions
Left knee pain much better and less bothersome while lifting
Hit personal bests and able to lift ~10% heavier; improved gym performance

side_effects.description: BPC stings before injection if needle cap not recapped and allowed to sit; possible increased sensitivity in stomach injection area from repeated injections

protocol_notes: Loading phase for 6 weeks then maintenance. Injecting 2x per day, 2x per week via subcutaneous stomach injections (5mg vials with 1ml bac water). Did not combine injections into one shot. Prior blood test ~1 year ago showed elevated testosterone (slightly higher than normal for females) and high iron levels. Plans to retest after cycle. Height 5'7", target weight 65kg.
